heading: Where do I start?
subhead: Pick the path that matches your situation. You can switch tracks any time.

tracks.title: Complete beginner
tracks.description: Never invested before. Start with budgeting and saving, then build up step by step until you can confidently buy your first PSX stock.

tracks.title: Already invest, new to PSX
tracks.description: Skip the foundations. Jump straight to how PSX works, opening a CDC account, placing your first trade, and the Pakistan-specific tax rules.

tracks.title: Shariah-only investor
tracks.description: Stay within KMI-30 territory. Learn Shariah screening, purification of non-compliant income, and how to identify compliant PSX stocks.
